basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Dr Inventories--merchandise $100 / Cr Cash and cash equivalents $100. Semantically equivalent to expected.

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Dr Inventory $300 / Cr Accounts Payable $300. Inventory=Inventories and Accounts Payable=Trade payables are semantically equivalent.

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Dr Cash $180 / Cr Issued capital $100 / Cr Share premium $80. Issued capital=Share capital--Common and Share premium=APIC are semantically equivalent.

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Dr Cash $500 / Dr Cost of sales $300 / Cr Revenue from sale of goods $500 / Cr Inventories $300. Cost of sales=COGS, all amounts match.

basic_05_pay_accounts_payable.reason: Dr Accounts Payable $50 / Cr Cash $50. Accounts Payable=Trade payables, semantically equivalent.

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Dr Long-term Borrowings $100 / Cr Long-term Borrowings $100. Long-term Borrowings=Notes payable for a loan refinancing, semantically equivalent.

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Dr Bank Loan Payable $200 / Cr Common Shares $200. Bank Loan Payable=Notes payable, Common Shares=Share capital--Common, semantically equivalent.

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Dr Contract Liabilities $100 / Cr Revenue from Rendering of Services $100. Account names and amounts match expected.

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Dr Treasury Shares $200 / Cr Cash and Cash Equivalents $200. Exact semantic match.

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Dr Dividends Declared $500,000 / Cr Dividends Payable $500,000. Dividends Declared is an accepted alternative to debiting Retained Earnings directly; both produce the same net effect on equity.

basic_11_convert_preferred_to_common.reason: Dr Preferred Shares $100 / Cr Common Shares $100. Preferred Shares=Share capital--Preferred, Common Shares=Share capital--Common, semantically equivalent.

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Dr Employee Benefits Expense $100 / Cr Cash $100. Under IFRS (IAS 19), salaries fall under employee benefits expense. Semantically equivalent for a salary payment.

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Dr Utilities Expense $50 / Cr Accounts Payable $50. Expected Cr Accrued liabilities $50. Accounts Payable is not semantically equivalent to Accrued liabilities for an accrual entry; accrued liabilities is the correct account when no invoice has been received.

basic_14_casualty_loss.reason: Dr Casualty Loss $2,000 / Cr Inventory $2,000. Inventory=Inventories, semantically equivalent.

basic_15_no_entry.reason: Actual journal_entry has empty lines array, functionally equivalent to null/no entry.

int_03_machinery_purchase.reason: Accounts and total amounts correct (Dr Machinery 800K, Cr Trade Payables 700K, Cr Cash 100K total), but actual splits Cash into 3 separate lines (30K, 20K, 50K) instead of one combined 100K line. Structure differs.

int_04_major_overhaul.reason: Dr Machinery $200,000 / Cr Cash $200,000. Account names semantically equivalent.

int_05_bond_issuance_discount.reason: Structure correct (Dr Cash, Dr Discount, Cr Bonds Payable $3M) but Cash amount is $1,972,548.70 and Discount is $1,027,451.30 vs expected $2,657,510 and $342,490. PV calculation used wrong formula. Amounts materially wrong.

int_06_warranty_provision.reason: Dr Warranty Expense $900,000 / Cr Warranty Provision $900,000. Exact match on accounts and amounts.

int_07_decommissioning_provision.reason: Amounts correct ($4M + $1.95M = $5.95M), but used two separate debit accounts (Offshore Marine Structure $4M + Decommissioning Asset $1.95M) instead of a single Dr PP&E Marine structures $5,950,000. Expected combines both into one PP&E debit.

int_08_share_repurchase_cancel.reason: Dr Share capital (Issued capital) $50,000 / Dr Retained earnings $10,000 / Cr Cash $60,000. Semantically equivalent account names, exact amounts.

int_09_merchandise_with_costs.reason: Expected Dr Inventories $1,150,000 (single line) but actual splits into 3 inventory debits ($1M + $120K + $30K = $1,150K). Also 'Transportation expense' used instead of 'Distribution costs' ($50K). Structural and naming differences.

int_10_prepayment.reason: Dr Prepayments (Prepaid Expenses) $1,000,000 / Cr Cash $1,000,000. Semantically equivalent.

int_11_land_instalment_discount.reason: Expected 3 lines: Dr Land $49,173K, Dr Discount on LT payables $10,827K, Cr LT payables $60M. Actual has only 2 lines: Dr Land $49,173,243.25, Cr LT borrowings $49,173,243.25. Missing discount contra-liability and face value liability. Net method instead of gross.

int_12_site_improvements.reason: Debit side correct (Site improvements $1,750K, Land $2,360K) but credit side uses generic 'Cash and cash equivalents' for both instead of 'Cash' ($1,750K) and 'Cash-chequing' ($2,360K). Expected distinguishes between cash and chequing accounts.

int_13_donation_note.reason: Dr Donations expense $1,000,000 / Cr Notes payable $1,000,000. Exact match.

int_14_vehicle_mixed_payment.reason: Dr PP&E Vehicles (Motor Vehicles) $40,000 / Cr Cash $20,000 / Cr Notes payable $20,000. Semantically equivalent.

int_15_bank_loan.reason: Dr Cash $200,000 / Cr Long-term borrowings $200,000. Semantically equivalent.

int_17_customer_deposit.reason: Expected Dr Cash-chequing $5,000 but actual uses generic 'Cash and cash equivalents'. Account name differs (expected specifies chequing sub-account).

int_18_multiple_assets.reason: Dr Office Equipment $5,500 / Dr Motor Vehicles $250,000 / Cr Cash $5,500 / Cr Trade Payables $250,000. Semantically equivalent.

int_19_service_revenue_cash.reason: Dr Cash $25,500 / Cr Revenue from rendering of services $25,500. Semantically equivalent.

int_20_service_revenue_credit.reason: Dr Trade receivables $31,500 / Cr Revenue from Rendering of Services $31,500. Semantically equivalent.

int_21_rd_expense.reason: Pipeline returned INCOMPLETE_INFORMATION with no journal entry (null). Expected Dr R&D expense $50,000 / Cr Cash-chequing $50,000. Complete miss.

int_22_compound_sale_with_tax.reason: Dr Cash $45,900 / Dr Trade receivables $30,000 / Dr COGS $55,500 / Cr Revenue $69,000 / Cr Sales tax payable $6,900 / Cr Inventories $55,500. All amounts exact, account names semantically equivalent.

int_23_split_electricity.reason: Dr WIP $15,000 / Dr Utilities expense $5,500 / Cr Credit Card Payable $20,500. Account names semantically equivalent. Amounts exact.

int_24_advertising.reason: Expected Dr Advertising expense $22,000 / Cr Cash $22,000. Actual splits into Dr Advertising Expense $19,469.03 + Dr ITC Receivable $2,530.97 / Cr Cash $22,000. Only difference is tax-related (extracted HST). Tax-relaxed valid.

int_25_building_purchase_allocation.reason: Expected Cr Other payables $4,500,000 but actual uses 'Trade payables'. Also expected Cr Cash-chequing but actual uses generic Cash. Trade payables vs Other payables is a substantive classification difference.

int_26a_payroll_recognition.reason: Expected 2 credits (Statutory withholdings payable $7,750, Cash-chequing $37,250). Actual over-splits withholdings into 4 separate liability lines. Also uses Employee benefits expense instead of Salaries expense. Structural and naming differences.

int_26b_payroll_remittance.reason: Expected Dr Statutory withholdings payable $7,750 / Dr Employee benefits expense $6,300 / Cr Cash $14,050. Actual has 4 debit lines for liability decreases ($14,050 total) with no expense recognition for employer matching portion. Missing expense line entirely.

int_28_promotional_literature.reason: Dr Advertising expense $7,000 / Cr Cash $7,000. Exact match.

int_29_security_deposit_received.reason: Dr Cash $25,000 / Cr Security deposits payable $25,000. Semantically equivalent to Rental deposits received.

int_30_short_term_loan_advance.reason: Dr Short-term Loans Receivable $2,000,000 / Cr Cash $2,000,000. Semantically equivalent.

int_31_vehicle_nonrecoverable_tax.reason: Expected single Dr PP&E Vehicles $52,800 / Cr Other payables $52,800. Actual splits debit into two lines and credits Short-term Borrowings instead of Other payables. Substantive classification difference.

int_hard_01a_note_derecognition.reason: Pipeline returned INCOMPLETE_INFORMATION with null journal_entry. No entry produced. Expected Dr Cash $98,356 / Dr Loss on derecognition $1,644 / Cr Trade receivables $100,000.

int_hard_01b_note_collateralized.reason: Accounts semantically equivalent. Amounts differ by $0.16 rounding ($98,356.16 vs $98,356; $1,643.84 vs $1,644) which is minor PV rounding.

int_hard_02a_investment_fvtpl.reason: Actual capitalized transaction costs into FVTPL investment ($3,100,000 single debit). Expected expensed them separately: Dr FVTPL $3,000,000 + Dr Transaction costs $100,000. Wrong IFRS 9 treatment.

int_hard_02b_investment_fvoci.reason: Accounts semantically equivalent (Investments -- FVOCI vs Financial assets at FVOCI). Amounts match exactly at $3,100,000.

int_hard_02c_investment_equity_method.reason: Accounts semantically equivalent (Investment in Ford -- Equity Method vs Investment in associate). Amounts match exactly at $3,100,000.

int_hard_16a_rent_prepaid.reason: Accounts semantically equivalent (Prepaid Rent matches; Cash and Cash Equivalents acceptable for Cash--chequing). Amounts match at $24,000.

int_hard_16b_rent_expense.reason: Accounts semantically equivalent (Occupancy Expense is a standard synonym for Rent expense). Amounts match at $24,000.

int_hard_27a_meal_overtime.reason: Exact match on accounts and amounts. Dr Employee Benefits Expense $125 / Cr Credit Card Payable $125.

int_hard_27b_meal_meeting.reason: Debit account mismatch: actual used Entertainment expense, expected Meeting expense. These are distinct GL accounts with different purposes.

int_hard_27c_meal_entertainment.reason: Accounts semantically equivalent (Corporate Credit Card Payable vs Credit card payable). Amounts match at $125.

int_hard_27d_meal_factory.reason: Accounts semantically equivalent (Inventories -- work in progress vs WIP Manufacturing overhead). Amounts match at $125.

int_hard_32a_grocery_entertainment.reason: Actual split entry into expense $1,200 + ITC receivable $120 (tax lines added). Expected single Dr Entertainment expense $1,320. Only difference is tax treatment. Tax-relaxed valid.

int_hard_32b_grocery_breakroom.reason: Actual split entry into expense $1,200 + ITC receivable $120 (tax lines added). Expected single Dr Employee benefits expense $1,320. Only difference is tax treatment. Tax-relaxed valid.
